# GitHub Copilot instructions

This repo is a WeaveHacks 4 starter.

- Preserve or improve W&B Weave instrumentation.
- Use `src/lib/weave.ts` for Weave initialization.
- Keep `.env.example`, `README.md`, and `docs/submission-checklist.md` in sync with code changes.
- Prefer features that are easy to demo in 3 minutes and easy to inspect in Weave.
